SHORT NAME: VBP_ADJSTMT_PCT 

LONG NAME: VBP_ADJSTMT_PCT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: X.XXXXXXXXXXXX 

COMMENT: This field comes from the Claim VBP Adjustment Percent (CLM-VBP-CLM-ADJSTMT-PCT) that is present 
on the last claim record included in the stay.
